changeSet.author: eqa-module

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_eqa'

changeSet.comment: Add top-level EQA parent menu item

changeSet.author: eqa-module

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_alerts'

changeSet.comment: Add Alerts menu item under EQA

changeSet.author: eqa-module

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_eqa_management'

changeSet.comment: Add EQA Management menu item under EQA

changeSet.author: eqa-module

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_eqa_distribution'

changeSet.comment: Add EQA Distribution menu item under EQA

changeSet.author: eqa-module

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'banner.menu.eqa'

changeSet.comment: Add localization entries for EQA menu items (supports both legacy and generic localization schemas)

changeSet.author: eqa-module

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_module WHERE name = 'EQAView'

changeSet.comment: Add system module for EQA/QC feature

column.name: description
column.value: EQA alerts, programs, distributions, QC management

changeSet.author: eqa-module

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_module WHERE name = 'EQAView'

changeSet.comment: Register all EQA/QC URLs with the EQAView module

changeSet.author: eqa-module

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_module WHERE name = 'EQAView'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Reception'

changeSet.comment: Assign EQAView module to Reception role

changeSet.author: eqa-module

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_module WHERE name = 'EQAView'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Results'

changeSet.comment: Assign EQAView module to Results role

changeSet.author: eqa-module

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_module WHERE name = 'EQAView'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Global Administrator'

changeSet.comment: Assign EQAView module to Global Administrator role

column.name: system_role_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Global Administrator')

changeSet.author: eqa-module
changeSet.comment: Update alert_type CHECK constraint to include EQA/QC alert types
